meaning: n.厨房烹调法,烹饪,烹调风格
examples: The Garden's menu is based on Hawaiian regional cuisine.
Elizabeth David enthuses about the taste, fragrance and character of Provencal cuisine.
They were proud of their cuisine.
Instead, patrons can enjoy live music and New Orleans-style cuisine, from jumbo shrimp to jambalaya.
